description_long: This is a two-story bakery building with a colorful, whimsical facade and a prominent blue-and-white striped awning above the entrance. The ground floor features a storefront with a wooden bench, a small signboard, and a door, while the upper floor has two windows with decorative trim. A large cylindrical water tower sits atop the flat roof, supported by a wooden frame. The building is set on a tiled sidewalk with urban details such as a streetlamp, fire hydrant, and utility boxes. The exterior walls are painted in pastel shades, with some areas showing signs of wear and patchwork, and the rear includes a metal staircase and various service elements.
description: A colorful, two-story bakery with a striped awning, decorative windows, and a rooftop water tower, set on a detailed urban sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with a blue-and-white awning, two upper windows, a bench, a signboard, and the water tower above.
description_view_1: Left side reveals a streetlamp, utility boxes, a side window, and some wall damage, with the water tower visible on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a metal staircase, a back door, a slanted window, and service elements like bins and crates.
description_view_3: Right side features boarded-up windows, utility meters, stacked planks, and more urban details along the sidewalk.
attribute_storefront_signage: There is a small rectangular wooden signboard to the right of the entrance at ground level, with a chalkboard-style appearance. No visible text or branding is discernible on the signboard. No other signage is visible on the facade.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A blue-and-white striped awning is present above the main entrance. The awning is rectangular, made of fabric, and does not display any visible bakery branding, logos, or text.
attribute_architectural_style: The building features a whimsical, cartoon-like urban style with pastel colors, decorative window trim, and a rooftop water tower. The design blends elements of early 20th-century commercial architecture with playful, stylized details.
